name: ChartHop
description: Monitor ChartHop people operations platform for employee access, role-based access controls, and organizational structure compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Contact support@charthop.com with subject 'New App Request' to create an API App for your organization
2. Specify required permission levels (at minimum VIEW access)
3. After approval, ChartHop will provide an API Authorization Token
4. Enter the token and your Organization ID below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: ChartHop App API authorization token. Contact support@charthop.com to create an App for your organization.

credentialFields.label: Organization ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your ChartHop organization ID or slug (found in ChartHop URL or organization settings)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews ChartHop users with access to the people operations platform, checking for active and inactive accounts

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Reviews ChartHop roles and their associated policies to verify proper access control configuration

checks.name: Organisation Chart
checks.description: Verifies that an organizational structure exists in ChartHop with active job positions
